name: xunlei-ai-task-agent
description: A high-fidelity Electron demo for Xunlei AI Task Agent.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && vite build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json
